What We Do

Complete Relocation Services

Every service you need for a smooth, stress-free move — handled by trained professionals.

🏠

House Shifting

Complete home relocation — packing, loading, transport, unpacking. Every item handled with care.

Learn more →
🏢

Office Relocation

Zero-downtime office moves with secure IT handling, document management, and weekend scheduling.

Learn more →
🛵

Bike Transport

Cradle-mounted two-wheeler transport with scratch protection across all 100 cities.

Learn more →
🚗

Car Carrier Service

Open and enclosed car transport — city-to-city or interstate, with full insurance coverage.

Learn more →
📦

Warehouse Storage

Secure climate-controlled storage. First 48 hours free. Extended options available.

Learn more →
🚚

Intercity Moves

Transparent all-inclusive pricing for moves between any of our 100 South Indian cities.

Learn more →
Why Choose Us

Not Just a Truck and a Phone Number

PackersHub brings genuine local knowledge to every one of our 100 cities — from coastal humidity considerations in Visakhapatnam to hill-route logistics in Ooty, from festival traffic planning in Tirupati to monsoon scheduling across Kerala.

🎯
Transparent Pricing
One all-inclusive quote — no hidden charges for stairs, fuel, or packing materials. You pay exactly what was agreed.
🛡️
Transit Insurance Included
Every consignment carries goods-in-transit insurance as standard, not as an upsell.
📍
100 Cities. Real Local Teams.
Not call-centre subcontracting. Our local crews know your neighbourhood.
💳
Flexible Payment
UPI, NEFT, Credit/Debit Card, Cash — no cash-only pressure.

🛡️

100% Safe Delivery Guarantee

Your belongings arrive in the same condition they left in, on the agreed date, with nothing missing or damaged. Every item is photographed and logged at pickup. Every vehicle is GPS-tracked. Every consignment is insured. If anything goes wrong, our claims process ensures fair, prompt compensation.

📞 Call: +91 77310 74075 💬 WhatsApp Quote
FAQ

Common Questions

Everything you need to know before booking your move.

How much does house shifting cost with PackersHub?
Pricing depends on distance, volume of goods, and specific requirements. We provide free, all-inclusive quotes after a proper survey — call or WhatsApp +91 77310 74075 for your personalised estimate.
What cities do you serve?
PackersHub serves 100 cities across 5 South Indian states: Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, and Kerala. See our state pages for the complete city list.
Is goods-in-transit insurance included?
Yes. Every PackersHub consignment includes goods-in-transit insurance as standard — not as an add-on. Your belongings are protected from pickup to delivery.
How far in advance should I book?
For local moves, 3–5 days ahead is usually sufficient. For interstate moves or moves during peak periods (academic year transitions, festive seasons), 1–2 weeks ahead ensures crew and vehicle availability.
Do you charge for stairs or narrow lanes?
No. Our all-inclusive quotes cover all standard moving scenarios including stairs, elevators, and narrow access roads. You pay exactly what was quoted.
Can I get a quote without an in-person visit?
Yes. We offer video survey quotes for all cities in our network. Call or WhatsApp +91 77310 74075 and share details about your move.

Ready to Move? Let's Make It Easy.

Get your free, all-inclusive quote in under 30 minutes. No obligation, no pressure.

📞 Call: +91 77310 74075 💬 WhatsApp Us Now
